identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a serene, trustworthy, and clear interface for church tithe management, blending modern stewardship with timeless values.
identity.theme_strategy: Light Mode Primary (Divinity/Clarity) with Dark Mode Support (Vigil/Focus)
principles: Clarity is Kindness: Data must be legible and actions obvious.
Serenity in Structure: Generous spacing, no clutter.
Respectful Hierarchy: Primary actions (Giving/Saving) feel important.
Soft Precision: Rounded corners, gentle shadows, crisp borders.

typography.installation: Add 'Outfit' via Google Fonts link in index.html or import in CSS.

usage_rules: Use Primary (Deep Slate) for Sidebar, Headers, and Primary Buttons.
Use Secondary (Amber Gold) for 'Positive/Divine' actions like 'Registrar Dízimo' (Record Tithe) or 'Novo Membro' (New Member).
Backgrounds should be off-white (hsl(210 40% 98%)) to reduce eye strain, not pure white.
Cards must remain pure white with subtle borders.

structure: Sidebar (Fixed Left, w-64, Primary Dark Bg)
Header (Sticky Top, Glassmorphism, Breadcrumbs, User Profile)
Main Content (p-6 or p-8, Bento Grid Layout)
Left: 50% width, Hero Image (Stained Glass), Overlay with Quote
Right: 50% width, Centered Form, Clean White Bg

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-lg h-10 px-6 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground shadow-sm hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-lg h-10 px-6 font-medium

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-lg border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

images.logo_placeholder: Use a simple Cross or Dove icon from Lucide-React

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px, consistent across app

functionality_map.toasts: Use 'sonner' for all notifications (Success: Green, Error: Red, Info: Blue)

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid soft colors or subtle textures.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Use 'Outfit' font for all headings to establish character.
Dashboard must use a Bento Grid layout.
Tables must have sticky headers and pagination.
Use Skeleton loaders for data fetching states.
Do not ask clarifying questions, assume best practices.
